# Examples

Composition exemplars lifted from the reference project. Each file is verbatim; see references/reference-project.md for the lift recipe.

- [home](./home.md) — Page chrome is a layout primitive painted on the default surface token.
- [issues](./issues.md) — Filter row is a horizontal stack with justify='space-between'.
- [create-repo-card](./create-repo-card.md) — Token-painted card surface with multi-input form and action footer.
